files.name: table.component.ts
table.variants.ts

docs.overview:
# Table A set of composable table primitives for displaying structured data. Use `n-table` for static or lightly interactive tables; use `n-data-table` when you need built-in sorting, filtering, selection, or pagination. ## Usage ```html @for (row of rows; track row.name) { }
Name Status Amount
{{ row.name }} {{ row.status }} {{ row.amount }}
``` ## Variants ```html ...
...
``` ## Sizes ```html ...
...
``` ## With caption ```html ...
A list of recent invoices.
``` ## With footer ```html ...
Total $975.00
``` ## Scrollable (responsive) Wrap in `n-table-scroll` to enable horizontal scroll on small screens. The wrapper is keyboard-focusable; pass `nLabel` to expose it as a named ARIA region for screen readers: ```html ...
```
docs.api:
# Table API

## `table[n-table]`

| Input | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `nVariant` | `'default' \| 'striped' \| 'bordered'` | `'default'` | Visual style variant |
| `nSize` | `'default' \| 'compact' \| 'comfortable'` | `'default'` | Cell padding size |
| `nClass` | `string` | `''` | Extra Tailwind classes |

## `thead[n-table-header]`

| Input | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `nClass` | `string` | `''` | Extra Tailwind classes |

## `tbody[n-table-body]`

| Input | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `nClass` | `string` | `''` | Extra Tailwind classes |

## `tfoot[n-table-footer]`

| Input | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `nClass` | `string` | `''` | Extra Tailwind classes |

## `tr[n-table-row]`

| Input | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `nClass` | `string` | `''` | Extra Tailwind classes |

## `th[n-table-head]`

| Input | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `nClass` | `string` | `''` | Extra Tailwind classes |

## `td[n-table-cell]`

| Input | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `nClass` | `string` | `''` | Extra Tailwind classes |

## `caption[n-table-caption]`

| Input | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `nClass` | `string` | `''` | Extra Tailwind classes |

## `n-table-scroll`

Responsive wrapper with `overflow-x-auto`. Wrap any `table[n-table]` to enable horizontal scrolling on narrow viewports. The wrapper is keyboard-focusable (`tabindex="0"`) so the overflow can be scrolled with arrow keys (WCAG 2.1.1). Set `nLabel` to expose it as a named ARIA `region` for screen readers.

| Input | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `nLabel` | `string` | `''` | Accessible name. When set, the wrapper becomes `role="region"` with this `aria-label`. |
| `nClass` | `string` | `''` | Extra Tailwind classes |

demos.name: bordered.ts
demos.content:
import { Component } from '@angular/core'; import { TableBodyComponent, TableCellComponent, TableComponent, TableHeadComponent, TableHeaderComponent, TableRowComponent, } from '../table.component'; @Component({ selector: 'demo-table-bordered', standalone: true, imports: [ TableComponent, TableHeaderComponent, TableBodyComponent, TableRowComponent, TableHeadComponent, TableCellComponent, ], template: ` @for (row of rows; track row.name) { }
Name Status Role Amount
{{ row.name }} {{ row.status }} {{ row.role }} {{ row.amount }}
`, }) export class TableBorderedDemo { rows = [ { name: 'Alice Johnson', status: 'Active', role: 'Admin', amount: '$250.00' }, { name: 'Bob Smith', status: 'Inactive', role: 'User', amount: '$150.00' }, { name: 'Carol White', status: 'Active', role: 'Editor', amount: '$350.00' }, { name: 'David Brown', status: 'Pending', role: 'User', amount: '$75.00' }, ]; }

demos.name: with-caption.ts
demos.content:
import { Component } from '@angular/core'; import { TableBodyComponent, TableCaptionComponent, TableCellComponent, TableComponent, TableHeadComponent, TableHeaderComponent, TableRowComponent, } from '../table.component'; @Component({ selector: 'demo-table-with-caption', standalone: true, imports: [ TableComponent, TableHeaderComponent, TableBodyComponent, TableRowComponent, TableHeadComponent, TableCellComponent, TableCaptionComponent, ], template: ` @for (row of rows; track row.invoice) { }
A list of recent invoices.
Invoice Status Method Amount
{{ row.invoice }} {{ row.status }} {{ row.method }} {{ row.amount }}
`, }) export class TableWithCaptionDemo { rows = [ { invoice: 'INV-001', status: 'Paid', method: 'Credit Card', amount: '$250.00' }, { invoice: 'INV-002', status: 'Pending', method: 'Bank Transfer', amount: '$150.00' }, { invoice: 'INV-003', status: 'Unpaid', method: 'PayPal', amount: '$350.00' }, ]; }

demos.name: with-footer.ts
demos.content:
import { Component } from '@angular/core'; import { TableBodyComponent, TableCellComponent, TableComponent, TableFooterComponent, TableHeadComponent, TableHeaderComponent, TableRowComponent, } from '../table.component'; @Component({ selector: 'demo-table-with-footer', standalone: true, imports: [ TableComponent, TableHeaderComponent, TableBodyComponent, TableFooterComponent, TableRowComponent, TableHeadComponent, TableCellComponent, ], template: ` @for (row of rows; track row.description) { }
Description Qty Unit Price Total
{{ row.description }} {{ row.qty }} {{ row.unitPrice }} {{ row.total }}
Total $975.00
`, }) export class TableWithFooterDemo { rows = [ { description: 'Design Services', qty: 3, unitPrice: '$150.00', total: '$450.00' }, { description: 'Development', qty: 5, unitPrice: '$75.00', total: '$375.00' }, { description: 'Consulting', qty: 2, unitPrice: '$75.00', total: '$150.00' }, ]; }
